title: AIIMS Delhi Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Project Nurse II Posts
description: The All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill the vacancies for various Project Nurse II Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the GNM can grab this chance and apply for the AIIMS Delhi Notification 2026 . Here we have included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply before the last date of a...
